params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 #724 poe V6-F generalization re-test (사용자가 계정 등록 완료 2026-05-07). #723 verdict was AUTH_REQUIRED_SKIP — now login resolved. V6-F mechanism (request-side intercept, L-027 pattern, notion-validated) auto-applies when sd->is_ai_service && sd->is_page_load && has_recent_block. Expected: PII submit → V6-A NDJSON block (or other engine emit) → hard reload → V6-F intercept on poe.com text/html GET → warning HTML rendered.

check_details.MANDATORY_LOGIN_PRE_VERIFIED: 사용자 이미 등록 완료 (per user message 2026-05-07)
test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt to chat input
3. Verify engine block fires ([APF:block_response] service=poe in production log)
5. SPA fetches /poe.com root or chat URL → V6-F request-side intercept
6. Engine emits H2-framed warning HTML → browser renders

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble visible + Korean warning text + engine block + V6-F fire (production log [APF:page_inject_h2_request] service=poe) → poe DONE → mission ratio 15→16/31=0.516
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_block_only: engine block fires but no V6-F intercept on hard reload — investigate poe path matching (path_patterns='/' literal, may not match SPA /chat URLs)
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_failed_doc: V6-F fires but H2 framing issue (similar to V6-E-fix #721 failure) — engine code adjustment needed

notes: 48차 V6-F generalization test #2 on poe (post-login). User registered account; SSO no longer blocks. If V6-F fires for poe → autonomous mode SECOND advance.
